description_long: This is a modern, full-size pickup truck with a four-door crew cab configuration and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear. The exterior features a two-tone color scheme, with a light gray cab and hood contrasting against darker gray fenders, bed, and lower body panels. The truck is equipped with large, rugged black wheels and side steps for easier cabin access. The front grille is wide and horizontal, flanked by rectangular headlights, and the rear includes a tailgate with a protective bed rail and a visible rear bumper. The windows are tinted, and the vehicle has a visible roof antenna. The overall design suggests durability and utility, suitable for both urban and off-road environments.
description: A two-tone, four-door pickup truck with a spacious cargo bed, rugged wheels, and side steps, designed for utility and comfort.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, tailgate, rear bumper, and protective bed rail.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the four-door crew cab, side step, and the length of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, headlights, hood, and windshield.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the four-door configuration, side step, and cargo bed.
